children.name: Chrome
E2E_Tests\FC001_questionnaire.spec.ts
Questionnaire E2e Tests

Configure questionnaire with 'Pages must be completed in order' and verify 'Hide' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' and check condition 'Disable' action
E2E_Tests\FC002_questionnaire.spec.ts
Configure questionnaire with 'Disable next button' and verify 'Show' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Change a question' and check Questionnaire 'Enable' action
FC_002_Questionnaire Flow
E2E_Tests\FC004_questionnaire.spec.ts

Configure questionnaire with 'Complete questionnaire without warning' and verify 'Disable' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' and check Questionnaire 'Set Value to Variable' action
FC_004_Questionnaire Flow
